programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. A severe storm is approaching when Mr Fischoeder hires Bob as his private chef for an event on a secret island for eccentric, wealthy and influential gentlemen, but the weekend event soon turns into a drug-fuelled and murderous rave with Bob acting as the only sober voice of reason - meanwhile, Linda gives the kids a crash course on cocktail party etiquette when the Belchers arrange a mocktail party for Tina.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Sitcom about three desperate young men who reside in ancient Rome. Grumio meets Justin - the father who left him on a hill as a baby and who now wants to make up for lost time - Stylax starts dating Camilla, a female discus thrower, amidst a sex ban during the Games, and Marcus and Delphine come to terms with their respective pasts.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts another episode of the exciting and iconic gameshow as a brave contestant takes on the infamous Banker and, by opening those iconic 22 red boxes in the right order, could be in with the chance of winning a life-changing cash prize. There are no questions here except for one: Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Animated series based on the DC Comics superhero team. Batman and Gordon time travel to the future to avoid chores, but they still find ways to watch TV.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: Animated fun with Scooby-Doo and the gang. The gang have to work with the Blue Falcon and Dynomutt to stop a giant dragon robot that the Blue Falcon has wanted to capture for years.

programme.title: Buying the View
programme.desc: House-hunting show that explores luxury listings in majestic mountain ranges, sprawling beaches, and glittering urban skylines. Scott and Brittany, with the help of estate agent Christopher, are hoping to find their dream home so they can move on with the next stages in their lives of marriage and kids - they love Oakville in Ontario and want a lakefront home with enough space to entertain.

programme.title: Billie & Greg: The Family Diaries
programme.desc: Reality series. With school nearly out for summer and Arthur about to start a new school, Billie is left doubting whether she has made a good decision - meanwhile, Margot starts swimming lessons and Greg gets a job, but it seems that he is a bit out of practice. Elsewhere, Billie and Sue find Chatty in a bad way that results in a visit to hospital - when a worrying phone call to Billie follows, it sends their worlds into a spin and drastic measures need to be taken. With Chatty hitting rock bottom, Billie, Greg and Sue rally together to get Chatty booked into rehab - however, all is not as straightforward as they hoped.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: The drama continues in Essex with Ella's birthday party - when Harry tells her that he's spotted Dan and his new girl on a double date with Jodie and Diags, Ella questions Jodie's loyalty before Jodie feels awkward and leaves the party. Following the fallout from Ella's party, Dan is not happy that Harry has been talking to Ella about his business and decides to call him to have it out - meanwhile, Elma organises a surprise birthday bash for Courtney so she can redo her 30th birthday and have the party she deserves. Elma recruits Saff, Jordan, Freddie and Dani to help - following their recent dramas, Saff, Harry, Liv and Freddie then come face to face at the party. Amidst the drama, there is a new face on the scene as Amy's newly single brother Wills heads out to dinner with Amy, Billy, Jordan and Sophie - Amy thinks Wills could be a good match for Elma, but when she mentions this to Elma, Saff reveals that she has history with Wills.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: Head Over 'Hills': US reality series. NeNe extends an olive branch to Cynthia and Cynthia's boyfriend Mike decides that he's ready to take things to the next level. [S] S12 Ep8

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Follow the lavish lives of six savvy champagne-swilling Beverly Hills women who were born for shopping and partying! A catamaran ride ends in rough waters as Sutton finds herself searching for a buoy of support, Garcelle questions Kyle's loyalty, and Jennifer calls out a conspiracy that leaves Erika and Dorit seeing red - as Boz tries to get to the bottom of the group's divide, the final dinner in Saint Lucia leads to some very ruffled feathers.

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revamp of the iconic game show where three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles as they compete in the ultimate supermarket challenge to win a 3,000-pound prize - along with the classic Supermarket Sweep quizzes, trolley dashes and pastel jumpers, the revamped show features exciting new games, challenges and some famous faces.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Graham Norton welcomes essential skills teacher Orla, development manager Kelly, and events duty officer Ben as they take on puzzles and the iconic Wheel in the hope of winning 50,000 pounds.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: There is cause for celebration in Essex as Dani finally passes her driving test on her seventh attempt - to celebrate Dani's success, Saff throws her a congratulatory party and includes Junaid on the invite list, but Dani is not impressed that Junaid is there. Picking up on the awkward atmosphere, Junaid decides to leave but not before congratulating his old friend - Saff witnesses this conversation and decides to leave the party with Junaid. Elsewhere at Dani's party, tensions also simmer when Liv and Freddie come face to face for the first time since their heated conversation - Liv approaches Freddie and admits that things got out of control as the two try to bury the hatchet. Meanwhile, Saff and Ella bump into Wills at his flower stall and the girls have a bit of flirty banter with him - Ella tells Saff that Wills is a bit of her and Saff admits that she still finds him sexy. The girls joke that they can fight for him, but they also know that Elma has caught his eye too.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Cheshire
programme.desc: Reality series. It's been an emotional whirlwind for the Housewives, and jaws hit the floor when icon Dawn Ward has a surprising and unique return to Cheshire - little is left to the imagination at the last calendar shoot and the ladies turn up in style to support an overwhelmed Ell for an inspiring charity evening filled with triumph and tears.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: A Whine of a Time: US reality series. The ladies head to the Toronto Carnival in Canada and Porsha has a few things to get off her chest before the festivities begin. [S] S12 Ep9

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Follow the lavish lives of six savvy champagne-swilling Beverly Hills women who were born for shopping and partying! The ladies of Beverly Hills reunite to work through hurt feelings and shocking allegations on the heels of a tumultuous year - Dorit speaks out about her separation and feeling unsupported by Kyle as a surprise statement leaves her at a loss for words, Bozoma responds to those questioning her relationship with Keely and accusations that she was being manipulated by Dorit, and Garcelle has to answer for hurtful insinuations she made throughout the series.

programme.title: New: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Nadine Coyle, Rick Edwards and Jake Wood all trying to guess well-known phrases from animated clues - if they can 'say what they see', they could get the chance to win 50,000 pounds for their chosen charity.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Graham Norton invites AJ Odudu, Gok Wan and Charlotte Church to try their luck at spinning the Wheel and solving puzzles to win big for charity.

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? Do you think you might be in the top 50 per cent of the country, the top ten per cent, or even the top one per cent? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack hosts this quiz show where 100 contestants begin every episode, but who will make it to the end and answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right... and win up to 100,000 pounds?

programme.title: TikTok: Murder Gone Viral
programme.desc: With exclusive access to the victims' families, friends and the police, this documentary strand explores extraordinary true crime cases linked to the world's fastest-growing social media platform. Raheel Ahmad looked the perfect match for TikTok photographer Sania Khan on paper - he came from a good family and wanted to be a doctor, but Raheel couldn't pass his medical exams once the couple had gotten married and then tried to hurl himself and her from the window of their 28th-storey Chicago apartment just months after their huge wedding. Hospitalised with mental problems, Raheel admitted that he had lied about his age and had been unfaithful - Sania then went public on TikTok with her agonies over whether to stick by her man or request a divorce. Her honesty and growing self-reliance resonated with abused women around the world and sent shockwaves through the South Asian community in America - the couple separated, but Raheel started to plot his revenge as Sania's posts went viral.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Lois takes Quagmire to her high school reunion instead of Peter, and the rest of the family tries to cover up a pizza delivery man's death.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Peter hires Brick Baker, the town's new lawyer, to represent him in litigation against his new neighbour, but matters get complicated when the neighbour turns out to be Brick - meanwhile, Brian and Stewie become lobstermen and save Rupert from the perils of the deep.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Peter turns the Pewterschmidt mansion into a hotel when Lois and Carter attend the funeral of Lois' childhood nanny.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: US animated comedy series. Steve and Snot are forced to stop being friends after some friction forms between their mothers, so they enlist Roger's help to break the ice.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. When Linda takes to caring for an injured raccoon behind the restaurant's dumpster during a block party, she regrets calling Animal Control after Teddy tells her that they might kill the poor animal - meanwhile, a live concert is set up in front of the restaurant but the family can't see the stage, a factor which complicates Louise's plan to let friends watch it from her bedroom window in exchange for sweets.

programme.title: Piglets
programme.desc: Sitcom set in a fictional police training college. The excited recruits get to wear their uniforms for the first time, Dev reveals a deeply personal issue that Steph offers to help with, and Paul gets a second shot at his mission.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Sitcom about three desperate young men who reside in ancient Rome. Marcus's parents are visiting for the weekend and he is keen to keep them and Delphine as far apart as possible - as Stylax pursues a romance with Ursula, one of the Vestal Virgins who guard the city's sacred flame, Grumio finds some mouldy cheese under his bed and spots a business opportunity.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection. [S]

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: There is cause for celebration in Essex as Dani finally passes her driving test on her seventh attempt - to celebrate Dani's success, Saff throws her a congratulatory party and includes Junaid on the invite list, but Dani is not impressed that Junaid is there. Picking up on the awkward atmosphere, Junaid decides to leave but not before congratulating his old friend - Saff witnesses this conversation and decides to leave the party with Junaid. Elsewhere at Dani's party, tensions also simmer when Liv and Freddie come face to face for the first time since their heated conversation - Liv approaches Freddie and admits that things got out of control as the two try to bury the hatchet. Meanwhile, Saff and Ella bump into Wills at his flower stall and the girls have a bit of flirty banter with him - Ella tells Saff that Wills is a bit of her and Saff admits that she still finds him sexy. The girls joke that they can fight for him, but they also know that Elma has caught his eye too.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Scott investigate a death in Midsomer Mere, a place where villagers seem to have the ability to predict future events - John Ransom's head was covered in scorch marks, the result of his brother Max's research into second sight. programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Classic sitcom about a chirpy bus driver and his conductor pal. Stan and Jack eavesdrop on a medical check-up that Blakey is having, but they end up jumping to the wrong conclusions.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Viv and Bob are stunned by Louise's suggestion she buy their businesses. Gennie worries she'll never be a proper Dingle, and Laurel makes progress with Arthur.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Debbie gets jealous when Eli opts to spend time with Gennie rather than her. Viv tells Louise she'll sell her the business, and Katie informs Gray and Perdy she wants a Caesarean.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liam leaves for work as a distraught Maria packs her bag for the hospital, unable to find a way of telling him about the baby. Meanwhile, Jack learns Paul has been charged.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maria continues to keep Liam in the dark as she heads back to the Street. Bill lets slip to a perplexed Gail about Audrey meeting Ted, and Liz refuses to go on Vernon's cruise.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Detective drama series. There is plenty on Frost's plate when senior citizens are targeted in a string of vicious attacks, but at least he can call on his attractive new female sergeant for help.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series about a policeman in Yorkshire in the 1960s. Nick investigates an apparent crime wave in Aidensfield after a mysterious spate of burglaries, and Blaketon is particularly keen to get to the bottom of the problem as the Assistant Chief Constable is due to arrive shortly for the last shoot of the season at Lord Ashfordly's.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series about a policeman in Yorkshire in the 1960s. The annual funfair comes to Aidensfield and causes much excitement but some ill feeling too - when the proprietor of a nearby caravan site complains about the noise and mess, Nick tells her that there is nothing he can do. A five-year-old boy then goes missing...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A tour of Plummer's famous relish factory ends in tragedy when one of the visitors is crushed against towers of relish bottles and dumped naked into a 200-degree steriliser - when the dead man is found to be an executive with rival company Fieldway Foods, Barnaby and Scott's investigation uncovers many secrets and lies among the Plummer family. Someone is also trying to frighten matriarch Amelia Plummer, but who feels strongly enough about Plummer's Relish to commit murder?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Debbie reveals Gennie's scheme to Pollard as jealousy about Eli's friendship with the girl overwhelms her. Lexi asks Donald for her job back and Donna tells Marlon to get a job.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Donald tells Carl about his plans to retire and asks him to be managing director of the company. Diane offers Marlon his old job back and Eli asks Gennie out for lunch.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Claire discovers the extent of the family's financial difficulties when Ashley admits to using their own money to prop up the business. Audrey makes a disturbing discovery.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Audrey's shocking discovery prompts Maria to confess her distressing secret, Marcus is suspicious when Sean returns early from holiday and Chesney is upset by Les's news.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series about a policeman in Yorkshire in the 1960s. When the surgery in Aidensfield is broken into one night and Dr Ferrenby gets assaulted, pills that were stolen in the raid are passed off as other drugs and sold around the area with disastrous consequences - meanwhile, Kate discovers that a patient's miscarriages have been caused by foreign drugs she took for morning sickness, and Greengrass is furious when his pink Chrysler Imperial gets stolen.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series about a policeman in Yorkshire in the 1960s. Nick gets word that a violent criminal is to be released from prison and may be heading his way - meanwhile, snow falling in Aidensfield leaves Kate cut off with a heavily pregnant woman.

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: Crime drama. East Sussex CID emerges from the ashes of a shocking betrayal and prepares for a major criminal trial - after Grace's team intercepted millions of pounds of cocaine being smuggled into Newhaven port in a case where courier Daniel Starr worked for an elusive figure known as The Merchant, who had evaded identification for years, Starr gave up The Merchant's identity and Grace is determined to see him go down for his crimes as the ruthless drug lord faces trial. Meanwhile, Brighton resident Meg Magellan's daughter Laura leaves for a gap year and Meg receives a jury summons which brings with it a terrifying dilemma - as the trial unravels, Grace becomes convinced that The Merchant is trying to destabilise the case against him and must work doggedly to find whoever is doing his dirty work. As a double murder at a local park throws his team into a puzzling case, Grace is pushed to the brink to see justice done before an unwelcome conversation burdens him with a terrible secret.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A man is found in the middle of a crop circle, naked, with two puncture wounds on his back and the back of his head shaved. A Ufologist claims extra terrestrial involvement but DCI Tom Barnaby looks for a more plausible explanation. When a series of bodies are found in crop circles in the cornfields of Sir Harry Chatwyn, squire of the village of Midsomer Parva, it looks like a case of extra terrestrial kidnapping. Two bodies, bearing the classic hallmarks of alien abduction burnt fingers, a puncture wound to the lower back and a chunk cut out of the hair - seem to provide evidence that UFOs do exist. But when Inspector Barnaby and Sergeant Troy dig deeper, it seems there could be a far more simple explanation for these deaths cold blooded murder motivated by greed, love and jealousy.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway investigate the death of Professor Miranda Thornton after she apparently killed herself when her dating video was leaked onto a vicious media blog - Lewis does not believe that Thornton's death was suicide and has qualms about Kit Renton, the blog's founder, and Sophie Leland, the owner of the dating website. When one of Renton's employees is found murdered, the police realise she must have been killed because she knew something about Thornton's death - as Lewis finds that Thornton, Renton and Leland were all at Oxford together 20 years before, he realises that this is actually an age-old revenge story...

programme.title: Lost
programme.desc: American drama following the survivors of a plane crash on a remote tropical island in the South Pacific Ocean. Violence ensues and a mysterious island beast makes a reappearance when Michael and Locke clash over Walt's upbringing, and Charlie is tempted to read the missing Claire's diary.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Sean Bean stars in the drama series set during the Napoleonic Wars of 19th-century Spain and based on Bernard Cornwell's best-selling novels. Portugal 1812 - the Spanish village of Adrados has been overtaken by a horde of French, Spanish and British deserters who have taken two Englishwomen hostage. Much to the disgust of Sir Augustus Farthingdale, Captain Sharpe is assigned the task of delivering the ransom...

programme.title: World Superbike Highlights
programme.desc: The 2026 World Superbike Championship continues with the Pirelli Portuguese Round - the 4.592km track at the Autodromo Internacional do Algarve will push the riders to their very limits as they look to get points on the board. The early years of WorldSBK saw the championship visit Portugal on two occasions with four races held at the Estoril track in the 1988 and 1993 seasons - the series then returned to the western European country in 2008 at the new 100,000-capacity Algarve International Circuit close to Portimao on the Atlantic Ocean. Several riders from Portugal have competed in WorldSBK over the years, the most successful of them being Alex Vieira - he is the only Portuguese man to have won a race in the series at the Osterreichring in 1989 and to have started from pole at Hockenheim in 1988.

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? Do you think you might be in the top 50 per cent of the country, the top ten per cent, or even the top one per cent? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack hosts another episode of the second series of the show. The 1 Club is the ultimate leveller - it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes, because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts... they're all about logic and common sense. It doesn't matter if you're 15 or 50 - this is the quiz that the whole family can play together. 100 contestants begin every show, but who will make it to the end and answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right... and win up to 100,000 pounds?

programme.title: Aai Aai Ya Karoon Mai Kya
programme.desc: A cheerful young woman's life turns chaotic when love, family expectations and unexpected situations collide, leading to humorous and emotional twists.

programme.title: Ek Rishtaa: The Bond of Love
programme.desc: After being deceived by his son-in-law, Vijay and his son struggle to regain their business and status.

programme.title: Kudrat Ka Kanoon
programme.desc: After being wrongfully imprisoned, Dr. Vijay discovers his wife Aarti is accused of murder. Determined to uncover the truth about their daughter's tragic fate, he fights for justice.

programme.title: Muqadama
programme.desc: Ajit's world shatters when his wife dies after a horrific crime. His quest for revenge leads to bloodshed, but the law catches up, sentencing him to hang for his actions.

programme.title: Ram Lakhan
programme.desc: Two brothers split because of differing beliefs, yet fate brings them back together as they eventually rescue and support each other through unfolding events.

programme.title: Gunehgar
programme.desc: Two brothers see themselves as freedom fighters trying to liberate Kashmir from India, but they run into trouble with D.I.G. Ajay Thakur, who's determined to stop them.

programme.title: Ghayal Once Again
programme.desc: When a video of his mentor's murder surfaces, an investigative journalist takes action to find those responsible.

programme.title: Bomb Blast
programme.desc: Jai Kishen is an aspiring police officer who marries his ladylove against his parents' wishes. MLA Sadakhare hires some men to carry out a bomb blast.

programme.title: Simmba
programme.desc: Starring: Ranveer Singh,Sonu Sood. Simmba's living the crooked cop dream-until a woman's assault flips his world. Now, he's ditching the cash, picking up courage, and going head-to-head with his powerful, criminal boss.

programme.title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Kareena Kapoor. Pawan, a Hanuman devotee, finds a speech-impaired Pakistani girl lost in Haryana and undertakes a dangerous journey across borders to reunite her with her family with love.

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Sonakshi Sinha. Chulbul Pandey, a rebellious cop, slays a politician's brother. Retaliation ensues as the politician's henchmen target Chulbul's wife, igniting his fury.

programme.title: Hero The Bullet
programme.desc: Starring: Gopichand,Nayanthara. Shiva, a young man, is looked down upon by his father due to his irresponsible behaviour. He soon gets embroiled in a tussle with an egoistic gangster who threatens his family.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: Starring: Jeet,Biswajit Chakraborty. Raja is hired to shoot a party leader but is instructed not to kill him. When the politician ends up getting killed by an unknown assassin, Raja becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Kaliveera
programme.desc: Starring: Chirashree Anchan,Ekalavyaa. Kaliveera follows the journey of a tribal man, Kali determines to fight against the highly influential criminals involved in an international crime.

programme.title: Tholi Prema
programme.desc: Starring: Varun Tej,Raashi Khanna. Aditya looks for a missing girl but also reflects on his failed love story with Varsha, realizing their differences due to his impulsive nature.

programme.title: Runway 34
programme.desc: Starring: Amitabh Bachchan,Ajay Devgn. Two pilots brave harsh weather in Cochin, opting for a perilous landing in Thiruvananthapuram. AAIB investigation ensues, unraveling the risky decision.
